name: demail-restaurant
description: Demail Restaurant - Sistem Pemesanan Makanan Digital

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "bgRed.bold,bgBlue.bold" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "bgRed.bold,bgBlue.bold" "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
